class.name: GDKPackageResourcePack
class.brief_description: Metadata for a service-owned package resource pack loaded into res://.
class.description: A [GDKPackageResourcePack] is returned by [method GDKPackage.load_resource_pack_async] after a content package's [code].pck[/code] or [code].zip[/code] has been loaded through [method ProjectSettings.load_resource_pack]. It is read-only metadata; the backing package mount is owned by [GDKPackage] and remains mounted until [method GDK.shutdown].

method.name: get_package_identifier
method.description: Returns the current-session package identifier that supplied the resource pack.

method.name: get_mount_path
method.description: Returns the absolute mount root retained by the package service.

method.name: get_pack_relative_path
method.description: Returns the normalized package-relative path passed to [method GDKPackage.load_resource_pack_async].

method.name: get_pack_path
method.description: Returns the absolute path to the loaded [code].pck[/code] or [code].zip[/code] file.

method.name: get_package_details
method.description: Returns a copy of the package metadata dictionary captured when the resource pack was loaded.

method.name: get_replace_files
method.description: Returns the [code]replace_files[/code] value used when the resource pack was loaded.

method.name: get_offset
method.description: Returns the byte offset passed to [method GDKPackage.load_resource_pack_async].

members.member: The current-session package identifier that supplied the resource pack.
The absolute mount root retained by the package service.
The normalized package-relative path loaded from the mount.
The absolute path to the loaded [code].pck[/code] or [code].zip[/code] file.
A copy of the package metadata dictionary captured when the resource pack was loaded.
The [code]replace_files[/code] value used when the resource pack was loaded.
The byte offset passed to [method GDKPackage.load_resource_pack_async].
